SessionStart.command:
node -e "const r=require('child_process').execSync;let o='⚡ Welcome to Azure Functions!
';try{r('az --version',{stdio:'ignore'});o+='✅ Azure CLI
'}catch{o+='❌ Azure CLI — install: https://aka.ms/installazurecli
'};try{r('func --version',{stdio:'ignore'});o+='✅ Core Tools
'}catch{o+='❌ Core Tools — install: npm i -g azure-functions-core-tools@4
'};try{r('node --version',{stdio:'ignore'});o+='✅ Node.js
'}catch{o+='❌ Node.js
'};console.log(JSON.stringify({hookSpecificOutput:{hookEventName:'SessionStart',additionalContext:o}}))"
